Strange.  We definitely do not link to this page anymore our "project
section" of the website. In fact the reference to it was already removed
in 2005:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/www/en/projects/projects.sgml.diff?r1=1.171;r2=1.172;f=h

Will have to dig further into that.


Johann Kois
